creator: jmcoopr@webmail.bmi.net
text:
RIPEM -- RSA/DES-based Internet Privacy Enhanced Mail, version 2.1.
	Enciphers and deciphers messages using a public key encryption
	system.  Output is formated for embedding in electronic mail
	messages.

	NOTE:  I couldn't believe it when the Porter's Handbook wanted a
	shell archive for new ports.  If FreeBSD doesn't mean this, the
	Handbook should be changed.  :)

	Don't blame me . . .

Fix: ################################################
#                                              #
# Base Directory is ${PORTSDIR}/security/ripem #
#                                              #
################################################
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
